# True-positive samples: each non-comment line MUST be flagged by secret-scan patterns.
# Only safe, documented example values here. Real-looking provider tokens
# (ghp_, xoxb-, AIza, sk_live_, sk-ant-) are constructed at runtime in
# tests/hooks/test-secret-patterns.sh to avoid GitHub Push Protection.
AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE
password = "correct-horse-battery"
secret: 'do-not-commit-me-123'
api_key = "0123456789abcdef"
api-key: "another-fake-value"
DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;AccountName=fakeaccount;AccountKey=fakekey==
